name: breadcrumb
title: BTBreadcrumb
description: Compositional breadcrumb system with 6 building-block widgets. Compose BTBreadcrumb > BTBreadcrumbItem > (BTBreadcrumbLink | BTBreadcrumbPage | BTBreadcrumbEllipsis) with BTBreadcrumbSeparator between items.

files.content:
// Barrel for BTBreadcrumb compositional API.
export 'breadcrumb.widget.dart';

// BTBreadcrumbItem data class removed — use BTBreadcrumbLink widget instead.
// See breadcrumb.widget.dart for the compositional widget API.
